name: ApsaraDB RDS PostgreSQL with outdated engine versions
query: { dbInstances (where: { cloudProvider: { eq: "alibaba" } engine: { eq: "postgresql" } OR: [ {engineVersion_STARTS_WITH: "9"}, {engineVersion_STARTS_WITH: "8"}, {engineVersion_STARTS_WITH: "7"}, {engineVersion_STARTS_WITH: "6"} ] }) {...AssetFragment} }
